mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_COMPANY ( COMPANYCD, PLANTCD, COMPANYTYPE, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, BSNO, OPENYEAR, BSSECTORS, ZIPCD, ADDR1, ADDR2, CEONM, MANAGER, EMAIL, TEL, FAX, MOBILE, HOMEURL, CLAIMYN, PURCHASEYN, TRADSTDATE, TRADENDATE, GRADE, SQCERT, SQGRADE, SQSPONSOR, TSISOYN, REMARK, USEYN, ITEMSHEETTYPE, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{COMPANYCD}, #{PLANTCD}, #{COMPANYTYPE}, #{COMPANYNM}, #{COMPANYNM2}, #{BSNO}, #{OPENYEAR}, #{BSSECTORS}, #{ZIPCD}, #{ADDR1}, #{ADDR2}, #{CEONM}, #{MANAGER}, #{EMAIL}, #{TEL}, #{FAX}, #{MOBILE}, #{HOMEURL}, #{CLAIMYN}, #{PURCHASEYN}, #{TRADSTDATE}, #{TRADENDATE}, #{GRADE}, #{SQCERT}, #{SQGRADE}, #{SQSPONSOR}, #{TSISOYN}, #{REMARK}, #{USEYN}, #{ITEMSHEETTYPE}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_COMPANY SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE COMPANYCD = #{COMPANYCD}
